module-3-sales-leaderboard-project.label: Module 3 Sales Leaderboard Project
module-3-sales-leaderboard-project.summary: Turn a rough ranking query into a clean leaderboard.

mp-1-rank-by-price.title: Rank the products by price
mp-1-rank-by-price.prompt: Begin the Module 3 Sales Leaderboard Project. Return `name, price` from `products` in that column order. Sort the final result by `price DESC`.
mp-1-rank-by-price.hint: Use DESC instead of ASC for the price sort.

help.concept: Read the brief as a result contract: identify the source table or join path, the result columns, the row condition or grouping rule, and any required ordering.
help.hint_1: Build the result one clause at a time and run it after each meaningful change.
help.hint_2: Return `name, price` from `products` in that column order. Sort the final result by `price DESC`.

mp-1-rank-by-price.starterCode:
-- Returning name and price from products, ordered so the most expensive products appear first.
SELECT
  name,
  price
FROM products
ORDER BY price ASC;

mp-2-add-stock-tiebreaker.title: Add a stock tiebreaker
mp-2-add-stock-tiebreaker.prompt: Extend the Module 3 Sales Leaderboard Project with the next approved requirement. Return `name, price, stock` from `products` in that column order. Sort the final result by `price DESC, stock ASC`.
mp-2-add-stock-tiebreaker.hint: Use two columns in the ORDER BY clause.

help.concept: Read the brief as a result contract: identify the source table or join path, the result columns, the row condition or grouping rule, and any required ordering.
help.hint_1: Build the result one clause at a time and run it after each meaningful change.
help.hint_2: Return `name, price, stock` from `products` in that column order. Sort the final result by `price DESC, stock ASC`.

mp-2-add-stock-tiebreaker.starterCode:
-- Keep the ranking above.
-- Add stock to the result and sort stock ASC after price DESC.
SELECT
  name,
  price
FROM products
ORDER BY price DESC;

mp-3-finish-leaderboard.title: Finish the top-five leaderboard
mp-3-finish-leaderboard.prompt: Complete the Module 3 Sales Leaderboard Project. Return `name, price, stock` from `products` in that column order. Sort the final result by `price DESC, stock ASC`. Return only the first `5` rows.
mp-3-finish-leaderboard.hint: Add one LIMIT line after the ORDER BY clause.

help.concept: Read the brief as a result contract: identify the source table or join path, the result columns, the row condition or grouping rule, and any required ordering.
help.hint_1: Build the result one clause at a time and run it after each meaningful change.
help.hint_2: Sort the final result by `price DESC, stock ASC`. Return only the first `5` rows.

mp-3-finish-leaderboard.starterCode:
-- Keep the ranking above.
-- Limit the leaderboard to 5 rows.
SELECT
  name,
  price,
  stock
FROM products
ORDER BY price DESC, stock ASC;

try_module_3_sales_leaderboard_project_s.title: Preview the Price Ranking
try_module_3_sales_leaderboard_project_s.prompt: Before adding a tie-breaker and row limit, preview the main ranking. Return `name` and `price` from `products`, ordered from the highest price to the lowest.

module-3-sales-leaderboard-project.label: Module 3 Sales Leaderboard Project
module-3-sales-leaderboard-project.summary: Turn a rough ranking query into a clean leaderboard.

mp-1-rank-by-price.title: Rank the products by price
mp-1-rank-by-price.prompt: Start the leaderboard by returning `name` and `price` from `products`, ordered so the most expensive products appear first.
mp-1-rank-by-price.hint: Use DESC instead of ASC for the price sort.

help.concept: Ranking queries become easier to read when the most important rows appear first.
help.hint_1: Keep the selected columns the same.
help.hint_2: Sort with `ORDER BY price DESC`, then rerun the query.

mp-1-rank-by-price.starterCode:
-- Returning name and price from products, ordered so the most expensive products appear first.
SELECT
  name,
  price
FROM products
ORDER BY price ASC;

mp-2-add-stock-tiebreaker.title: Add a stock tiebreaker
mp-2-add-stock-tiebreaker.prompt: Add `stock` to the result, and sort by `price` descending with `stock` ascending as the second sort.
mp-2-add-stock-tiebreaker.hint: Use two columns in the ORDER BY clause.

help.concept: A secondary sort helps you break ties or make a leaderboard easier to scan.
help.hint_1: Add `stock` to the SELECT list first.
help.hint_2: Use `ORDER BY price DESC, stock ASC`, then rerun the query.

mp-2-add-stock-tiebreaker.starterCode:
-- Keep the ranking above.
-- Add stock to the result and sort stock ASC after price DESC.
SELECT
  name,
  price
FROM products
ORDER BY price DESC;

mp-3-finish-leaderboard.title: Finish the top-five leaderboard
mp-3-finish-leaderboard.prompt: Limit the ranked report to the top 5 rows.
mp-3-finish-leaderboard.hint: Add one LIMIT line after the ORDER BY clause.

help.concept: A limit turns a broad ranking into a short report someone can scan quickly.
help.hint_1: Do not change the selected columns or the sort order.
help.hint_2: Add `LIMIT 5;` at the end of the query, then rerun it.

mp-3-finish-leaderboard.starterCode:
-- Keep the ranking above.
-- Limit the leaderboard to 5 rows.
SELECT
  name,
  price,
  stock
FROM products
ORDER BY price DESC, stock ASC;

try-module-3-sales-leaderboard-project-s.title: Preview the Price Ranking
try-module-3-sales-leaderboard-project-s.prompt: Before adding a tie-breaker and row limit, preview the main ranking. Return `name` and `price` from `products`, ordered from the highest price to the lowest.
try-module-3-sales-leaderboard-project-s.hint: Select `name` and `price`, then sort `price` in descending order.

help.concept: This warm-up establishes the primary ranking used by the leaderboard project.
help.hint_1: Check the selected columns and table name in the SQL editor.
help.hint_2: Run the query and compare the result table with the expected result.

try-module-3-sales-leaderboard-project-s.starterCode:
-- Return name, price from the products table.
SELECT
  name,
  price
FROM products
ORDER BY price ASC;

try_module_3_sales_leaderboard_project_s.title: Preview the Price Ranking
try_module_3_sales_leaderboard_project_s.prompt: Before adding a tie-breaker and row limit, preview the main ranking. Return `name` and `price` from `products`, ordered from the highest price to the lowest.

sketch_project_brief.title: Project brief
sketch_project_brief.bodyMarkdown:
A weekly catalog dashboard needs a concise ranking of the highest-priced products.

Start with the primary sort, add a stable tie-breaker, then limit the result.

The finished query should read like a clear top-five leaderboard.
